# Certify - A Mock Certificate Generator

Certify (https://getcertified.tech) is a satirical, beautifully designed web application that allows users to instantly generate completely unofficial, Udemy-style certificates of completion for any course they can imagine. 

## Purpose
The platform is designed purely for entertainment. The certificates generated are not officially verified, legally binding, or affiliated with Udemy or any other real educational institution.

## Architecture
This application is a full-stack modern web application built with:
- Frontend: Next.js (App Router), React, Tailwind CSS
- Authentication: Clerk
- Database: Neon Serverless PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM
- Asset Storage: Cloudinary (for capturing and storing generated certificate images)

## Site Structure
- / : The main landing page
- /sign-in : Authentication login
- /sign-up : Authentication registration
- /dashboard : Protected route where users can fill a form to generate new certificates.
- /certificates : Protected route showing all certificates generated by the logged-in user.
- /certificate/[id] : Public route displaying a specific generated certificate image.
